case_title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES, VS. MELVIN SMITH ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION SERVED MAR-18-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, MELVIN

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, MELVIN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
